title: Handle provider outage
prompt: Primary sports data API starts timing out during peak traffic. What do I ship first?
response: Open circuit on repeated failures, route to fallback source, and lower polling frequency until primary stabilizes.

title: Stop duplicate alert storm
prompt: Users report repeated updates for the same play event. What is the first fix pass?
response: Audit event keys, add fingerprint-based dedupe, then replay recent payloads to validate edge cases before rollout.

title: Recover silent scheduler drift
prompt: Background jobs look active but one feed has gone stale for 40 minutes.
response: Add heartbeat age alarms, mark stale jobs degraded, and auto-restart failed loops with cooldown guards.
